title: euphorbia pervittata
intro: Euphorbia pervittata, also known as the Candelabra Tree or Devil's Backbone, is a species of plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) that is native to Madagascar. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Euphorbia pervittata include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential use in treating certain types of cancer. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can also be used as a topical cream or ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
